data.body:
PASS 1 review — [T10] Infrastructure / IaC overlay: NOT APPLICABLE / PASS.

This plan concerns git branch hygiene (moving `.bridge_state/bindings.json` and reconciler lock/gate files off the shared `tickets` branch to guarantee conflict-free union merges). It does not provision or configure any cloud resources, IaC (Terraform/CFN/CDK/Pulumi/Ansible), or Kubernetes/Helm. The "state"/"lock" terms refer to git-committed application state and in-process advisory locks, not IaC remote state or resource locking. Per the overlay's ANTI-FP guidance (not-applicable for non-infra tickets), no T10 findings are raised.
